inputs: A premium cinematic opening shot for a luxury coffee film: a clean white ceramic coffee cup rests on a rustic wooden table beside a large morning window, thin translucent steam rising slowly as the camera performs a smooth controlled push-in, natural soft daylight revealing realistic ceramic texture and warm wood grain.

parameters.story_context: Five-minute premium coffee film about the quiet ritual of morning, from origin and craft to the first sip. Each clip should feel like part of the same elegant, natural, high-end commercial.
parameters.scene_goal: Establish the hero object, mood, lighting language, and premium natural realism for the full film.
parameters.continuity: Use the same clean white ceramic cup, rustic walnut table, soft neutral morning light, and calm premium commercial tone across related scenes.
parameters.camera: ARRI Alexa style cinema camera, 50mm macro lens, slow dolly push-in, stable product-centered composition, subtle natural parallax, no sudden zoom
parameters.lighting: soft neutral morning window light, controlled highlights, gentle rim light on thin steam, realistic shadows, clean reflections on ceramic, no blown-out orange backlight
parameters.motion: thin steam rises slowly and naturally, camera moves forward smoothly, cup remains physically stable and solid, no jitter, no sudden shape changes
parameters.composition: close macro framing, cup as clear focal subject, rustic tabletop texture visible, softly blurred background, clean elegant negative space, uncluttered scene
parameters.color_grade: balanced neutral-warm filmic color grade, accurate white balance, soft highlight rolloff, natural contrast, realistic white ceramic, rich but restrained wood tones
parameters.realism_guardrails: photoreal live-action product footage, clean ceramic material, accurate scale, no surreal particles, no dirt spots, no color wash, no stylized CGI
parameters.physical_accuracy: steam is transparent and wispy, cup stays solid with a normal handle, table and background stay stable, reflections remain physically plausible
parameters.audio: soft room tone, gentle morning ambience, faint ceramic contact, quiet premium commercial atmosphere
parameters.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, jitter, flicker, warped cup, deformed handle, extra cups, melting ceramic, dirty cup, stains, floating specks, confetti, random particles, orange color cast, yellow wash, overexposed background, unstable steam blob, bad reflections, cartoon, game render, CGI plastic look, text, watermark, logo
